coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent pattern of morning gratitude and aspirational intent, yet the dismal completion rates for Sleep and Training expose a glaring chasm between your stated desire for discipline and the physical foundation required to sustain it. This disconnect indicates a fundamental breakdown in self-stewardship, where the demands of external performance (pitching, salesforce, networking) are prioritized over the internal disciplines that fuel elite output, leading to a trajectory-altering erosion of your physical and mental capital. Today, before *any* other input, execute your Sovereign Morning with absolute rigor, then immediately complete a full Training session, ensuring your body's commitment precedes your mind's ambition.
